protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: detergent-lysed virions... analysed by quantitative PCR; samples were subjected to ultracentrifugation

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: ERT reactions included Triton X-100; reaction products were extracted, ethanol washed, and used for SYBR Green PCR.

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: Triton X-100 detergent was added at room temperature to virions; fractions were assayed by ERT or p24 antigen.

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: Jurkat cells were washed and lysed using a Dounce homogeniser; lysate was cleared by centrifugation and fractions assayed by ERT.

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: Viral RNA assay used ERT reaction components, extraction as above, cDNA synthesis, and quantitative detection.
